fields.CollisionNodeID: byte - Hit location on ship model

optionalFields.UCritCorpusTimeSec: float - Corpus critical duration if CorpusCritical flag
optionalFields.CrewDamage: byte[] - Unit IDs of crew killed (if CrewDamage flag)
optionalFields.UCritCannon: byte - Cannon crit index (if CannonCritical flag)
optionalFields.UDamageToSailes: float - Sail damage (if SingleSailDamage or TotalSailDamage flag)
